name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN on E. Charleston Blvd in Las Vegas offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold buying, firearms loans, and pre-owned retail merchandise at 25–70% off.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a brick-and-mortar pawn shop chain location situated at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in Las Vegas, Nevada. Part of a larger EZPAWN family of stores, this location serves the local community with collateral-based financial services and a retail resale floor stocked with pre-owned brand-name goods. The store operates six days a week with extended hours (9am–7pm Monday through Saturday) and reduced Sunday hours (12pm–5pm).

The store offers a broad menu of services centered on short-term collateral loans and resale. Customers can bring electronics, jewelry, gold, tools, firearms, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, and sneakers in decent working condition to receive a cash loan on the spot. EZPAWN also buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, including broken gold of any weight or karat, with in-store testing to determine value. At this location specifically, firearms loans and purchases are available — a service not offered at all EZPAWN branches. Retail shoppers can browse thousands of pre-owned brand-name items at 25–70% off new retail prices, with new merchandise arriving daily. An online shop extends browsing beyond the store floor.

Several features set this location apart from independent pawn shops. The EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and reward points digitally and make online payments for pawn extensions and layaways. An Instant Quote tool provides estimated loan values for electronics online before a customer even visits the store, reducing uncertainty. Flexible purchase financing is available through third-party partners via the Take Today option (up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility), alongside a traditional layaway program requiring only 10% down. Product Protection Plans and a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and free stone replacement) add post-purchase value.

For someone in urgent need of fast cash, a pawn loan from EZPAWN can provide same-day liquidity without a credit check — but it comes at a cost. Pawn transactions are explicitly described as loans subject to fees and terms, with specifics only disclosed in-store. Loan amounts depend entirely on the assessed value of the item, and there is no transparency around interest rates or APR on the website. The redemption of pawned firearms adds a layer of complexity, requiring a background check unless exempted by law. EZPAWN is a practical option for asset-rich, cash-poor consumers, but borrowers should understand the full fee structure before committing.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program allows online management of pawns, layaways, and reward points from any device
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics loan values online before visiting the store
Retail merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new arrivals
Accepts firearms for loans and outright purchase — a service not available at all pawn locations
Gold and diamond buying includes in-store testing for accurate pricing, including broken gold of any karat
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payment schedule
Take Today flexible payment financing available via third-party partners, up to 12+ months
cons: Pawn loan fees and APR are not disclosed on the website — terms only available in-store
Loan amounts are entirely at the store's discretion based on item appraisal, with no published rate sheet
Redeemed pawned firearms require a background check, adding friction to item recovery
No credit-building component — pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus
Online payment functionality not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (relevant for multi-state customers)
best_for: Consumers who need same-day cash without a credit check and own electronics, jewelry, or tools with resale value
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at steep discounts
Firearm owners looking to access liquidity against rifles, shotguns, or handguns without selling outright
Shoppers who want to lock in a price on merchandise without paying upfront via layaway
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need fast cash against personal assets — particularly electronics, jewelry, or firearms — and cannot or choose not to use traditional credit channels. The main caveat is full fee opacity: APR and loan terms are not published online, so customers must visit the store to understand the true cost of borrowing.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, firearms, and more
Gold and diamond jewelry buying (including broken gold, any karat)
Firearms loans and outright purchase at select locations
Pre-owned retail merchandise at 25–70% off new retail prices
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics loan estimates
EZ+ Rewards Program with online pawn and layaway management
Take Today third-party flexible financing (up to 12+ months)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free stone replacement
Auto loans (listed as a special service at this location)
